required_skills: Strong command of programming and computer science concepts
Knowledge of core web principles (HTTP, the DOM, SSL, web servers)
Fluency with databases (schema design, querying, optimization)
education_requirements: Graduated from a Computer Science, Software Engineering, or similar program in a University or College
key_responsibilities: Write maintainable, testable, and performant software
Perform extensive testing to ensure high quality software
relevant_data: Konrad is a digital agency and product innovation firm specializing in strategy, design, and technology services.
The company has 501-1,000 employees and operates in the software development industry.
Konrad offers various employee benefits including a mentorship program, health and wellness benefits, retirement planning, and flexible working hours.
The company encourages a culture of learning and development.
